In the American Wild West, the Posse Comitatus was a group of citizens who formed a self-appointed law enforcement group to protect their communities. These posses were often formed in response to a lack of effective law enforcement, and their members were typically armed and organized. They would track down and apprehend criminals, often using force when necessary
